task_completion.description: Verify the OpenBCI GUI is running and loaded the correct playback file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI application is visible. The system control panel or playback file indicator shows 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' as the loaded file.

task_completion.description: Verify the GUI is configured to a 2-panel layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard area is divided into exactly two main widget panels.

task_completion.description: Verify the Time Series widget is displayed in one of the panels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the two panels has the header 'Time Series' and displays waveform graphs.

task_completion.description: Verify the Spectrogram widget is displayed in the other panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the two panels has the header 'Spectrogram' and displays a frequency heatmap.

task_completion.description: Verify the Spectrogram widget is configured to display Channel 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the Spectrogram widget's settings or header, the channel selector explicitly shows 'Chan 2', 'Channel 2', or '2' is selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the session is active and data is streaming/scrolling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The global control button shows 'Stop Data Stream' (indicating it is currently running), and the graphs in both widgets show populated data traces/heatmaps rather than being empty.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot shows the authentic OpenBCI GUI interface, not a text editor, image viewer, or web browser displaying a mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the widgets are rendering actual data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Time Series and Spectrogram widgets display complex, realistic EEG data patterns, not static placeholder graphics or empty axes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible showing scripts that artificially print 'Success' or bypass the GUI configuration steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct playback file is 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt'. The layout must consist of exactly 2 panels. The required widgets are 'Time Series' and 'Spectrogram'. The Spectrogram widget must be explicitly configured to display Channel 2.
